name: Oni Peach Drop
outcome: [AttackerName] suddenly leaps towards [TargetName] with [AttackerHisOrHer] plump ass extending towards [TargetHimOrHer]. [AttackerName] lands butt first into [TargetName]'s face, who quickly falls backwards from the combined force and weight of the oni woman!|n|[AttackerName] laughs as [AttackerHeOrShe] gives her bountiful rear a jiggly shake on [TargetName]'s face, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] to let out a muffled incoherent moan.
miss: [AttackerName] suddenly leaps towards [TargetName] with [AttackerHisOrHer] plump ass extending towards [TargetHimOrHer], but [TargetName] manages to leap out of the way of the curvy rear before it can strike, [AttackerName] lands gracefully, and skids to a halt with a small smile.
